characters.name: Tara Williams
characters.description: Tara WilliamsCharacter InfoNameTara WilliamsOccupationFBI Special AgentSkillsComputer HackingTechnological KnowledgeSeries InfoPortrayed byTara SamuelSeason(s)1-3Episode count56  Tara Williamsis the computer master of the FBI team. She often is tasked with finding out personal details about the criminals, such as their family life, criminal records and surveillance tapes. Known as the brains of the team, she is also skilled in codes. On most raids, she stays in the surveillance truck with Sue, monitoring the status of her fellow agents.
